NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}."}],"AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount(address,bytes32)":[{"details":"The `account` is missing a role."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"events":{"MultisigUpdated(address)":{"params":{"newMultisig":"New multisig address"}},"RevenuePulled(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The amount of revenue tokens","token":"The requested token to be withdrawn"}},"RewardSent(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The amount of rewarded tokens"}},"RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted to signal this."},"RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call. This account bears the admin role (for the granted role). Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"},"WithdrawToManager(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The amount of revenue tokens","token":"The requested token to be withdrawn"}},"WithdrawToMultisig(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The amount of revenue tokens","token":"The requested token to be withdrawn"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"details":"RevenueModule constructor","params":{"asset_":"Asset token contract address","controller_":"Controller contract address","manager_":"Manager account","owner_":"Default admin for this contract","staking_":"Staking contract address"}},"delegateSigner(address,bool)":{"params":{"signer":"Signer account","status":"Whether or not this signer is delegated"}},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"increaseControllerApproval(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens to approve","token":"Collateral token address to be approved"}},"pull(address)":{"params":{"token":"Token address to be checked for pending revenue"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"reward(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens to reward"}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"withdrawToManager(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens to withdraw","token":"Token address to be withdrawn"}},"withdrawToMultisig(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of tokens to withdraw","token":"Token address to be withdrawn"}}},"title":"RevenueModule","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"InsufficientRevenue()":[{"notice":"Token had no pending revenue to pull"}],"InvalidAmount()":[{"notice":"Invalid transfer amount"}],"NonZeroAddress()":[{"notice":"Invalid zero address"}]},"events":{"MultisigUpdated(address)":{"notice":"Emitted when multisig is updated"},"RevenuePulled(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when revenue is withdrawn from collateral manager to self"},"RewardSent(uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when revenue is sent to the staking contract"},"WithdrawToManager(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when revenue is sent to the manager"},"WithdrawToMultisig(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when revenue is sent to the multisig"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"ADMIN_ROLE()":{"notice":"Admin role manages delegating a signer and approving a controller to mint rewards from revenue"},"KEEPER_ROLE()":{"notice":"Keeper role can pull revenue from the manager, transfer revenue to the manager, and reward the staking contract"},"MULTISIG_ROLE()":{"notice":"Multisig role can withdraw revenue to a multisig contract"},"asset()":{"notice":"Address of asset token"},"controller()":{"notice":"Address of controller contract"},"delegateSigner(address,bool)":{"notice":"Allow a signer in the controller to sign orders where this contract is the payer"},"increaseControllerApproval(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Approve collateral tokens to be transferred during a Mint order"},"manager()":{"notice":"Address of collateral manager contract"},"pull(address)":{"notice":"Withdraw total pending revenue from collateral manager"},"reward(uint256)":{"notice":"Transfer asset tokens to staking contract"},"staking()":{"notice":"Address of asset staking pool"},"withdrawToManager(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Transfer tokens to collateral manager"},"withdrawToMultisig(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Transfer tokens to an multisig account (multisig)"}},"notice":"Manages revenue earned by the Tenbin protocol Revenue is frequently used to offset the cost of off-chain hedging. The revenue module can perform the following actions: - Withdraw revenue from the collateral manager - Transfer revenue back to the collateral manager - Transfer revenue to a multisig contract - Provide liquidity to mint new asset tokens as a reward - Reward the staking pool with asset tokens A keeper role is assigned by the revenue module to automate these tasks For example, the keeper might be called 2x per day to transfer revenue back to the collateral manager, and 1x per day to reward the staking params.status: Whether or not this signer is delegated

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.token: Collateral token address to be approved
Token address to be checked for pending revenue

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

ADMIN_ROLE().notice: Admin role manages delegating a signer and approving a controller to mint rewards from revenue

KEEPER_ROLE().notice: Keeper role can pull revenue from the manager, transfer revenue to the manager, and reward the staking contract

MULTISIG_ROLE().notice: Multisig role can withdraw revenue to a multisig contract

delegateSigner(address,bool).notice: Allow a signer in the controller to sign orders where this contract is the payer

increaseControllerApproval(address,uint2.notice: Approve collateral tokens to be transferred during a Mint order

pull(address).notice: Withdraw total pending revenue from collateral manager

reward(uint256).notice: Transfer asset tokens to staking contract

withdrawToMultisig(address,uint256).notice: Transfer tokens to an multisig account (multisig)
